name: Kindli (Hungarian Cookie for Purim)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Unsalted butter or parve margarine
1/2 cup Unsalted butter or parve margarine
recipeInstructions:
The recipe is served during Purim by Hungarian Jews. You can shape them like Hamentashen if desired; traditionally, they resemble little children wrapped in blankets, hence the Yiddish name, Kindli. The recipe is from The Jewish Holiday Kitchen by Joan Nathan.
1. Place flour in a large bowl and make a well in the center. Add whole eggs plus 1 egg yolk to the center and blend with fingers.
2. Incorporate softened butter or margarine and knead together.
3. Dissolve yeast in warm water, then add to potatoes. The warm potatoes will help activate the yeast.
4. Puree potatoes and add to flour mixture. Add sugar, salt, vanilla, lemon rind, and enough wine to bind ingredients together.
5. Knead well until a hard, smooth dough is achieved. Divide into round balls and let stand, covered, while making filling (about 45 minutes).
6. Preheat oven to 325°F. When filling is ready, punch dough and divide each ball into 6 or 7 round balls.
7. Roll dough out and cut circles 3 in diameter. Place about 1 1/2 tbsp filling along the center line, leaving a 1/2 in border.
8. Fold top and bottom over to cover ends of filling, then fold left side (covering 2/3 of dough) over to the right edge. Press sides together at center and edges.
9. Brush with remaining egg yolks and place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake about 30-45 minutes until golden brown.
10. Halfway through cooking, brush more egg yolk for a glazed effect. Makes 6 large or 36 small Kindli.
POPPY SEED FILLING:
1. Combine sugar and water, simmer while stirring over low heat.
2. Grind poppy seeds in food processor or blender.
3. Add to sugar mixture, followed by egg whites, vanilla, rinds and juices, rum, raisins, figs, and cinnamon.
4. Simmer for about 5 minutes until butter is melted and all ingredients are combined.
5. Add jam and butter, then simmer until butter is fully melted.
NUT FILLING:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
